name: 利刀「红玉」
icon: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/blade.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/ruby.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.ruby", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]

pages.text: 这曾经是一位自称为“玉”的浪人所使用的刀，其刀刃之锋利令人惊叹。因其朱红色的刀柄和浪人的自称而得名「红玉」。$(br2)后来，玉忽然消失在某地，其刀又被一狐妖所持……
